name: A Tad Sweet Squeeze Ketchup - Sweetened with Honey
description_html: Made with organic ingredients, Primal Kitchen® A Tad Sweet™ Ketchup combines the bold tomato flavor you crave with the gentle sweetness of real, organic honey. With no high fructose corn syrup or artificial sweeteners and 1g of added sugar per serving*, we bet this Certified Paleo, Keto Certified honey of a condiment will be your fave for burgers, dogs or homemade sweet potato fries.

name: Air Fryer Spray Oil
description_html: Primal Kitchen Air Fryer Spray Oil blends avocado oil with neutral-tasting coconut MCT oil and is seasoned with garlic, black pepper, and onion extracts. Spray directly on your food before air frying, roasting, or toasting for a pop of bold, savory flavor!

name: Arrabbiata Marinara Sauce
description_html:
Spice up pasta night with Arrabbiata Marinara Sauce.

Made with avocado oil, organic diced tomatoes, and crushed red peppers, this feisty sauce is made without added sugar, soy, or canola for a Keto Certified, Certified Paleo, and Whole30 Approved® sauce.

From shakshuka to halibut, chicken to penne, add this spicy tomato sauce to any Italian-inspired dish.

name: Avocado Lime Dipping Sauce
description_html: Fall head-avo-heels for the creamy, citrusy flavor of Primal Kitchen Avocado Lime Dipping Sauce! Our crave-worthy twist on a drive-thru favorite, this premium dipping sauce is purposefully crafted with real ingredients you can trust.

name: Avocado Oil Set
description_html:
Meet your new must-have culinary companions! Rigorously tested for quality, our delicious Primal Kitchen® Pure Avocado Oil has a high heat point that makes it ideal for grilling, broiling, air frying, baking, and more.

Gift it to the host or save 10% for yourself.

name: Avocado Oil Spray
description_html:
Primal Kitchen® Avocado Oil, now in spray-able, mess-free form. High-heat stable, this simple, delicious oil is convenient and perfect for baking trays, pots and pans, or if your salad needs a simple spritz.

Broiling, baking, grilling, sautéing, and baking have never been easier.

*There are currently different labels available at various retailers, but it's always the same Pure Avocado Oil.

name: Avocado Oil and Vinegar Vinaigrette & Marinade
description_html: Drizzle and dress with the best: PRIMAL KITCHEN® Avocado Oil and Vinegar Vinaigrette & Marinade! Organic red wine vinegar and organic stone ground mustard meet avocado oil for a deliciously zesty, flavorful dressing.

name: Baking Mix Kit
description_html:
Treat yourself to a delicious breakfast or dessert made with Vanilla Coconut Collagen Peptide Mix for hair, skin, and nail support in every bite. Spritz our Pure Avocado Oil Spray on your baking sheets or pans before cooking for perfect collagen muffins, cookies, cakes, and more!  

This 2-piece set lets you create the sweets you desire without the soybean oil, corn syrup, or artificial sweeteners found in most store-bought desserts.

name: Balsamic Vinaigrette & Marinade
description_html:
PRIMAL KITCHEN® Balsamic Vinaigrette and Marinade captures that classic sweet, tangy taste with the ingredients you love, like organic balsamic vinegar, avocado oil, and organic lemon juice.

This vinaigrette is Whole30 Approved® and ready to glaze on veggies or drizzle on leafy salads.

name: Best Dressed Bundle
description_html: A 4-pack bundle featuring our most popular dressings! From salads to meat marinades, these dressings are sure to be year-round pantry staples.

name: Buffalo Ranch Dressing & Marinade
description_html:
Ranch and buffalo lovers, this one's for you. Primal Kitchen Buffalo Ranch Dressing is made with avocado oil and high-quality ingredients with no dairy, sugar*, gluten, soy or canola in sight.

Dunk homemade sweet potato fries, dip chicken tenders or drizzle on your favorite salad for a zesty, no dairy dressing delight.

name: Buffalo Sauce Gift Set
description_html:
Fire up the flavor, heat up the party, or take tailgating to the next level with a Primal Kitchen Buffalo Sauce Gift Set. Featuring three bestselling sauces in heat levels from mild to wild, this savory collection brings just the right amount of fire for everyone at the table. 

This bundle includes:

name: COLLAGEN FUEL® Drink Mix - Chocolate
description_html: PRIMAL KITCHEN® COLLAGEN FUEL® Drink Mix is a delicious ingredient to help support hair, skin, and nails! Organic fair-trade cocoa and coconut milk powders pair perfectly with smoothies, coffee, and much more, while collagen peptides pack a punch. Tasty stirred, shaken, or blended.

name: COLLAGEN FUEL® Drink Mix - Peanut Butter
description_html: Enjoy the cozy, nutty taste you love with PRIMAL KITCHEN® COLLAGEN FUEL® Drink Mix in Peanut Butter! This delicious keto drink mix is made with bovine collagen peptides for 11g of collagen in every scoop. Support hair, skin, and nails by adding this collagen powder into smoothies, coffee, and more.

name: Caesar Dressing
description_html:
Primal Kitchen® Caesar Dressing & Marinade packs all the creamy, classic garlic and lemon flavors you love without the dairy, gluten, or anchovies.

The king of dressings, our mighty Caesar is intentionally crafted with premium, purposeful ingredients like avocado oil and cage-free egg yolks.

name: Chicken Dippin’ Sauce
description_html: Skip the drive-thru dash, and dunk at home instead! Crafted with real ingredients like avocado oil, Primal Kitchen Chicken Dippin’ Sauce delivers a slightly smoky, tangy flavor with just a whisper of ancho pepper.

name: Chipotle Lime Mayo
description_html: Taste why we’re the #1 natural mayo brand in the US!* Our creamy Chipotle Lime Mayo brings a hint of smoky pepper and a spritz of lime to our much-loved original mayo while keeping high-quality ingredients like cage-free eggs and avocado oil.

name: Chipotle Lime Mayo Sample
description_html:
Our Chipotle Lime Mayo is a zesty update to our classic mayo. 

This is a free sample currently being added to orders and is not available for individual purchase or request.

name: Chocolate Peppermint Collagen Drink Mix
description_html:
Get your winter glowing with the flavors of cozy cocoa and bright peppermint! With 11g of collagen per serving, Primal Kitchen Chocolate Peppermint Collagen Drink Mix gives the gift of skin, hair, and nail support in every cozy sip.

  • 11g of bovine collagen per serving

  • 0g of sugar; no artificial sweeteners or cane sugar

  • Holiday flavor, here for a limited-time — get it before it’s gone!

name: Cilantro Lime Dressing & Marinade
description_html:
Bring a fiesta of flavor with Primal Kitchen® Cilantro Lime Dressing & Marinade! Crafted with real ingredients like avocado oil, this zesty dressing adds a bright, tangy splash of citrusy flavor to any dish.

Drizzle on Southwestern salads, top tacos, or use as a refreshing marinade for grilled chicken and carne asada.

name: Classic BBQ Sauce, Organic & Unsweetened
description_html: Grill masters, cookout queens, and meat lovers rejoice! Bursting with bold, smoky flavor, PRIMAL KITCHEN® Classic BBQ Sauce is organic, unsweetened, and ready to drip, drizzle, or spread onto your favorite dishes.

name: Classic Dipping Duo
description_html: Primal Kitchen is now serving crave-worthy, drive-thru restaurant-inspired Dipping Sauces made with real ingredients like avocado oil—hold the seed oils, artificial sweeteners, and nonsense. This bundle includes two elevated twists on everyone’s favorite drive-thru sauces:

name: Cocktail Sauce
description_html: PRIMAL KITCHEN® Cocktail Sauce? Shrimp-ly the best. Serve up seafood faves like calamari, crab cakes, and more with this Certified Paleo and Whole30 Approved® succulent sauce. Made with organic ingredients and unsweetened, this sauce is spiced just right with organic horseradish.

name: Condiment Kit
description_html: Transform lunches with all the right sauces, toppings and condiments with our Condiment Kit. This kit includes:

name: Creamy Cashew Alfredo Sauce
description_html:
Creamy, classic alfredo taste. Smooth cashew base. Our NEW Creamy Cashew Alfredo delivers all the creamy comforts of delicious alfredo sauce without dairy. We combined the naturally smooth, rich taste of cashew butter with real avocado oil, roasted garlic, and seasonings to create a plant-based alfredo that pours smoothly and delights endlessly.

Suggested Recipes and Flavor Pairings: 

  • Create pasta dishes like the classic chicken fettuccini alfredo and butternut squash ravioli

  • Sauce up a pizza crust
  • Make creamy casseroles without the dairy
  • Use as a base for cozy, delicious soups

name: Creamy Cashew Kale Pesto Alfredo Sauce
description_html:
Decadently creamy, cashew-powered Kale Pesto Alfredo made with avocado oil. Two beloved Italian classics marry perfectly in this plant-based alfredo sauce that doesn’t need dairy to be unbelievably delicious. Cashews provide a creamy base, while real ingredients like kale and basil deliver winning flavor.

Suggested Recipes and Flavor Pairings: 

  • Create pasta dishes like the classic chicken fettuccini alfredo, sweet potato gnocchi, butternut squash ravioli, or spaghetti squash bakes
  • Sauce up a pizza crust; Simmer meats and veggies for easy, flavorful meals
  • Make creamy casseroles without the dairy
  • Use as a base for cozy, delicious soups

name: Creamy Sriracha Dipping Sauce
description_html:
Primal Kitchen Creamy Sriracha Dipping Sauce combines creamy heat with real ingredient goodness for a spicy sauce that’s irresistibly good. Made with real ingredients like avocado oil, jalapeño peppers, and just 1g sugar per serving to bring bold, it’s giving feisty flavor and just the right amount of heat. Hard to spell? Sure. Easy to love? Of course. Drizzle over tacos, spice up ramen, or dunk sweet potato fries for a mouth-watering kick

Suggested Recipes and Flavor Pairings: 

  • Drizzle over tacos, veggie bowls, and grain bowls
  • Add a dollop to ramen
  • Slather on sandwiches, sliders, and burgers
  • Create creamy tuna salad and deviled eggs with a kick
  • Dunk tenders, sweet potato fries, and tater tots
  • Dunk tenders, sweet potato fries, and tater tots

  • Serve with crab cakes or shrimp cocktail

name: Dijon Mustard
description_html: Bring on the Dijon! PRIMAL KITCHEN® Dijon Mustard is here and full of complex, spiced flavor. Dare to dress up your favorite dishes in this Organic, Certified Paleo, Keto Certified, and Whole30 Approved® delicious Dijon mustard.

name: Dip & Dunk Pack
description_html: Made for dipping and dunking, we curated the perfect Dip & Dunk Pack for wings, celery, chicken nuggets, pizza, and more! Everything you need for delicious dippin'. This 4-pack includes:

name: Dipping Sauce Sampler
description_html: Your favorite drive-thru sauces, made even better! Take home six delicious sauces crafted with premium ingredients like avocado oil — and NO seed oils or artificial sweeteners in sight. Drip, dunk, and drizzle your favorite real foods for a bold, crave-worthy taste.

name: Dreamy Italian Dressing
description_html:
Your dressing dreams are about to come true. PRIMAL KITCHEN® Dreamy Italian is made with savory Italian spices, making it our most flavorful, dreamy dressing yet!

This dressing is made with avocado oil and without industrial seed oils. We wouldn't dream of compromise in this delicious Certified Gluten Free salad dressing!

name: Founder Favorites
description_html: Three of Founder Mark Sisson's favorites, including the original mayo that started it all. This Founder Favorites Bundle includes:

name: Fresh Start Kit
description_html:
Give your pantry a mini makeover with this mouthwatering trio of must-haves. 

Includes our bestselling Ranch Dressing, creamy Mayo, and Organic Avocado Oil for effortless high-heat cooking.

name: Game Day Essentials
description_html: From tailgates to fall feasts, these flavorful picks make hosting a snap. At Primal Kitchen we believe in using real, high-quality ingredients so you can enjoy your favorite game day staples with confidence. This game day essentials pack includes:

name: Garlic Aioli Mayo
description_html:
Meet Primal Kitchen® Garlic Aioli Mayo, the perfect condiment companion to your artichokes, chicken sandwiches, and salad wraps. Made with avocado oil and cage-free eggs, our beloved mayo gets an upgrade with zesty lemon and flavorful garlic. 

Taste why we’re the #1 mayo brand in natural grocery!** 

  • No cane sugar, corn syrup, or artificial sweeteners
  • Cage-free eggs
  • Delicious avocado oil for good fats.

name: Gift Card
description_html:
Shopping for someone else but not sure what to give them? Give them the gift of choice with a Primal Kitchen gift card.

Gift cards are delivered by email and contain instructions to redeem them at checkout. Our gift cards have no additional processing fees.

*Please note that discount codes cannot be used toward the purchase of gift cards.

name: Golden BBQ Sauce, Organic & Unsweetened
description_html: An update of the classic Carolina BBQ sauce, PRIMAL KITCHEN® Golden BBQ Sauce is sweet, tangy, and full of flavor. Certified Paleo, Keto Certified, and Whole30 Approved®, this unsweetened sauce is made with organic ingredients. Slather on pulled pork or serve up on grilled peppers. Spicy and sweet, from veggies to meat, this sauce can’t be beat!

name: Greek Vinaigrette & Marinade
description_html:
Taste the flavors of the Mediterranean in a bottle! PRIMAL KITCHEN® Greek Vinaigrette and Marinade gets a flavorful kick with herbs like organic dried oregano and organic black pepper.

Tangy, tasty, and a little bit sweet, this salad dressing is the perfect fit for feta with romaine lettuce and heirloom tomatoes.

name: Green Goddess Dressing
description_html:
Dress your salad in something divine with PRIMAL KITCHEN® Green Goddess Dressing.

Made without soy and with pure avocado oil, this dressing will make you fall in love with a new favorite! Drizzle salads in a creamy combination of coconut aminos, spicy tarragon, organic Dijon mustard, and organic apple cider vinegar for a new favorite Whole30 Approved®, Paleo Friendly and Keto Certified dressing.

name: Grill Masters Sauce Bundle
description_html:
"Meat" your new best friend! The ultimate cookout condiments for grill masters and sauce lovers alike, certified organic with no artificial sweeteners and bursting with flavor. 

This kit includes:

name: Hawaiian Style BBQ Sauce
description_html:
Add a little “aloha” to pulled pork or cauliflower bites with PRIMAL KITCHEN® Hawaiian Style BBQ Sauce!

This island-inspired sauce is USDA Organic, Non-GMO Project Verified, Whole30 Approved®, Certified Paleo and Keto Certified…and full of flavorful ingredients like organic pineapple juice and coconut aminos.

name: Honey Mustard Vinaigrette & Marinade
description_html:
A dressing that really cuts the mustard! PRIMAL KITCHEN® Honey Mustard Vinaigrette & Marinade is the perfect companion in so many different dishes, from grilled chicken to butter lettuce salads and beyond.

Sweet, savory, and so, so good, this dressing is made with avocado oil and honey, and without soy and gluten.

name: Hot Buffalo Sauce
description_html: Turn up the heat on Buffalo! Hot Buffalo Sauce is the extra-hot, fully loaded version of our best-selling Buffalo Sauce. Primal Kitchen Hot Buffalo Sauce is made with high-quality, delicious ingredients like avocado oil and kickin' red cayenne peppers for a vegan, Keto Certified, Certified Paleo, and Whole30 Approved® feisty sauce!

name: Italian Vinaigrette & Marinade
description_html: Incredible Italian! PRIMAL KITCHEN® Italian Vinaigrette & Marinade is a citrusy dressing made with avocado oil. This vegan, Whole30 Approved®, Certified Paleo and Keto Certified vinaigrette ensures everything from salad to seafood is dressed for success!

name: Kiddo Klassics
description_html: These kid-approved sauces, toppers, and dips will bring big smiles to little ones–and the whole family! This kid-friendly kit comes with:

name: Korean Style BBQ Sauce
description_html: Make your meals sizzle with Primal Kitchen® Korean Style BBQ Sauce. Crafted with no artificial sweeteners, high fructose corn syrup, or cane sugar, this gluten-free and soy-free BBQ sauce combines plant-based sweeteners with a mouthwatering blend of spices, to create a crave-worthy Korean BBQ flavor that will make your taste buds pop. Perfect for beef bulgogi, shrimp skewers, and wings!

name: Mango Jalapeño BBQ Sauce
description_html: Mango meets jalapeño for a sweet ‘n spicy BBQ upgrade! You can’t say jalape-ño to this succulent Mango Jalapeño BBQ Sauce. Organic and Non-GMO Project Verified with ingredients like mango and coconut aminos, this sauce is Whole30 Approved® and Certified Paleo. Take BBQ chicken pizza to the next level or add kicked up flavor to kabobs and ribs. Go ahead: dip, marinate, glaze, and braise!

name: Matcha‌ ‌Collagen‌ ‌Keto‌ ‌Latte‌ Drink Mix - 9.3 oz
description_html: Add delicious, earthy matcha to your mornings with an easy, no-dairy drink mix. This Primal Kitchen® Collagen Keto Latte offers support for hair, skin, and nails with 11 grams of collagen per scoop and uncompromisingly delicious taste. Enjoy hot, over ice, or mixed with your favorite milk.

name: Mayo To-Go Duo
description_html:
Aw, so cute! Enjoy perfectly sized versions of our most popular flavored spreads, ready to squeeze at home or on the go. Pop gourmet Garlic Aioli in a purse, bring Chipotle Lime to a party, or dollop both on breakfast burritos and sliders.

Our delicious mini mayos are crafted with premium ingredients you can trust, like Certified Humane® cage-free eggs and avocado oil.

name: Mayo with Avocado Oil
description_html: Taste why we’re the #1 natural** Mayo brand in Grocery! Primal Kitchen Mayo levels up the creamy, classic flavor of real mayonnaise with premium ingredients you can trust—like cage-free eggs and delicious avocado oil for good fats.

name: Mild & Sweet Buffalo Sauce
description_html: Spread your wings and fry! Made with high-quality ingredients like avocado oil, Primal Kitchen® Mild Buffalo Sauce is thick, rich, and creamy, with classic Buffalo flavor and a peppery kick tamed by a touch of sweetness from mango puree. More than just a wingman for chicken, it’s also a delightful chili starter, cauliflower dip, or casserole companion.

name: No Dairy Classic Gravy
description_html: Real ingredients, classic flavor, no cooking required? That’s gravy. Primal Kitchen No Dairy Classic Turkey Gravy is made with turkey bone broth for the savory flavor and creamy texture you know and love from your homemade favorite.

name: No Dairy Hazelnut Collagen Creamer
description_html: Mornings just got more delicious! Add 11g of collagen peptides and 5g of MCT oil to your cup of joe with a serving of Primal Kitchen Hazelnut Collagen Creamer! Made with creamy coconut milk powder and no artificial sweeteners, this keto creamer is brimming with luscious hazelnut flavor to add to your AM brew.

name: No Dairy Mushroom Gravy
description_html: Making classic dishes without dairy? It’s all gravy! Primal Kitchen is bringing No Dairy Mushroom Gravy to the family table, for all the iconic, velvety flavor without soy, canola, gluten, or dairy.

name: No Dairy Vodka Sauce
description_html:
No dairy? No problem. Primal Kitchen No Dairy Vodka Sauce is made with creamy pumpkin seed butter instead of heavy cream, so you can ditch dairy and keep the decadent taste you love.

Made without gluten, soy, or canola oil, this vegan, plant-based sauce with avocado oil is Certified Paleo.

name: No Soy Teriyaki Sauce & Marinade
description_html:
Slay stir-fry and nail noodle dishes with our flavor-packed PRIMAL KITCHEN® No-Soy Teriyaki Sauce & Marinade!

Full of flavor and made without soy, gluten, grains, or canola oil, this USDA organic sauce is Certified Paleo, Keto Certified, and Whole30 Approved®.

From savory wings to sauteéd veggies, this marinade and sauce hits the spot.

name: No-Dairy Queso-Style Plant-Based Dip
description_html: Primal Kitchen Queso Style Plant-Based Dip is the delicious, no-dairy dream for nachos, chips, veggies, burritos, and more. Sugar-free, vegan, Keto Certified, and Whole30 Approved®, this creamy queso features a hint of jalapeños for just a kick of mild chili flavor.

name: No-Dairy Ranch Dressing & Marinade
description_html: Elevate salads, skillet meals, and more with the #1 Dressing brand in Natural Grocery!* Primal Kitchen® No-Dairy Ranch Dressing is made from real ingredients like cage-free egg yolks and good fats from avocado oil for a creamy, iconic taste.

name: No-Dairy Spicy Queso-Style Plant-Based Dip
description_html: Feeling spicy? Take a dip! Primal Kitchen is heating up the chip aisle with No-Dairy Spicy Queso-Style Plant-Based Dip! Vegan, sugar-free, and made with creamy pumpkin seed butter, this medium-heat, no-dairy, cheesy dipper is a snacking sensation.

name: No-Soy Island Teriyaki Sauce & Marinade
description_html:
Fire up the wok with tropical taste that transports you! With a splash of island-inspired organic ingredients like coconut aminos, ginger and pineapple juice, PRIMAL KITCHEN® No-Soy Island Teriyaki Sauce and Marinade sizzles in a stir-fry, marinates meats to perfection, and adds sass to sautéed veggies.

Whole30 Approved® and made without soy, this Asian-influenced organic sauce is Keto and Paleo Certified, so serve up sweet, kicky flavor in every uncompromisingly delicious bite!

name: Organic Avocado Oil
description_html:
Meet the elevated cooking companion you’ve been waiting for: Primal Kitchen Pure Organic Avocado Oil. 

Crafted from premium Mexican-grown organic avocados containing good fats, the neutral taste and silky texture of this high-heat cooking oil make it ideal for roasting, baking, sautéing, and stir-frying.

This pure avocado oil is USDA Organic and quality-tested to ensure only the best reaches your table!

name: Organic Balsamic Vinegar of Modena
description_html: PRIMAL KITCHEN™ Organic Balsamic Vinegar of Modena is Organic, Whole30 Approved®, and Certified Paleo. This PGI-certified, high-quality Italian balsamic vinegar is perfect for drizzling on salads, glazing meats and fish, dipping fruit and sourdough—and can be reduced to make a syrupy, thick balsamic reduction. Add this authentic Balsamic Vinegar to your pantry list.

name: Organic Extra Virgin Olive Oil
description_html: “Olive” at first sight! Add the PRIMAL KITCHEN™ Extra Virgin Olive Oil to your cooking collection of favorite fats. It’s Whole30 Approved®, Certified Paleo, Keto Certified, and Certified Organic. Non-GMO Project Verified and NAOOA Certified for quality and purity, the Primal Kitchen variety is an easy, high-quality companion for all your cooking. Drizzle, sizzle, dunk, and dress!

name: Organic Hot Honey Mustard
description_html:
Primal Kitchen Organic Hot Honey Mustard is on a mission to spice things up the organic way—using real, simple ingredients like organic honey, with a kick of heat that can’t be beat from organic cayenne pepper and organic mustard seeds. 

Suggested Recipes and Flavor Pairings:  

  • Use as a dipping sauce for sausage, chicken tenders, or pretzels. 

  • Spread on sandwiches and wraps to bring bold flavor to easy meals. 

  • Add to a charcuterie board. Hot Honey Mustard pairs perfectly with robust cheeses and cured meats.

  • Marinate chicken, or brush over fish or meat in the last few minutes of cooking to give your meal a delectably spicy kick.

  • Whip up a simple, homemade hot honey mustard salad dressing, or mix with avocado oil mayo for a creamy honey mustard dip that delivers a punch.

name: Organic Spicy Brown Mustard
description_html: Hot dog! You're going to love this organic, Spicy Brown Mustard from PRIMAL KITCHEN®. Smoky, savory, and organic, this kicky mustard can be spread on sandwiches, slathered on sausages, or used in a sauce to spice up honey mustard chicken. Certified Paleo, Keto Certified, Whole30 Approved®, and Kosher Certified, this condiment is the new king of the cookout.

name: Organic Unsweetened Ketchup
description_html: Our bestselling Unsweetened Ketchup captures the fresh, tangy tomato taste of your favorite childhood condiment without the cane sugar or corn syrup. It’s purposefully crafted with real food ingredients like California-grown tomatoes for a classic ketchup flavor kids and parents adore.

name: Organic Unsweetened Squeeze Ketchup
description_html: Savor the classic tomato taste of our Unsweetened Ketchup in an easy-to-use, squeezable bottle. With real, delicious ingredients like organic California-grown tomatoes, it’s your new main squeeze for breakfast, lunch, and family dinner nights.

name: Original Buffalo Sauce
description_html: Meet the best-tasting Buffalo Sauce on the block, from the #1 natural* Buffalo Sauce brand in Grocery!

name: Party Pack
description_html: Party hearty with flavorful, crowd-pleasing condiments, sauces, and dips that’ll get everyone in a celebrating mood. This party pack includes:

name: Pasta Sauce Bundle
description_html: Feeling saucy? The ultimate sidekick for pasta lovers and chefs alike, made with organic ingredients, no added sugars, and bursting with flavor. This kit includes:

name: Picnic Pack
description_html: Squeeze the day! Enjoy Primal Kitchen's fan-favorite condiments in a handy squeeze bottle that even little hands can operate.

name: Plant Based Caesar Dressing made with Avocado Oil
description_html: Creamy, zesty and delicious, the new Primal Kitchen® Plant-Based Caesar dressing reigns with delicious flavor and high-quality ingredients like avocado oil, organic apple cider vinegar, organic coconut aminos and organic herbs and spices. This vegan and Whole30 Approved® caesar dressing is perfect for drizzling classic romaine salads, tossing roasted vegetables or dipping crudité.

name: Plant Based Ranch Dressing
description_html:
Egg-cellent news for vegans and plant-based eaters: We made our most-loved ranch dressing without eggs! PRIMAL KITCHEN® Plant Based Ranch Dressing made with avocado oil has the same creamy, tangy, ranch taste you know and love.

Dip, dunk, and drizzle this dreamy, Whole30 Approved®, Paleo Friendly, Keto Certified, and plant-based dressing on anything from chopped veggies to bbq cauliflower.

name: Polynesian Dipping Sauce
description_html:
With 60% less sugar than the leading Polynesian sauce, PRIMAL KITCHEN® rebuilt a fast-food icon from the ground up—using real, delicious ingredients and avocado oil in our all-new Polynesian Dipping Sauce. The result? A sweet-tangy, island-inspired classic sauce that proves you can have big aloha flavor and big standards: no artificial sweeteners and no seed oils or soy.

Suggested Recipes & Flavor Pairings:
  • Dunk chicken tenders, sweet potato fries, or egg rolls
  • Brush on wings, meatballs, or shrimp kabobs during cooking for a sweet sticky glaze
  • Spread on pulled pork sliders
  • Drizzle over Hawaiian pizza or BBQ chicken flatbread
  • Marinate grilled pineapple
  • Mix with Primal Kitchen Yum Yum Dipping Sauce for a sweet and creamy sandwich spread

name: Poppyseed Dressing
description_html:
Look what just popped in! The newest darling in our dressing lineup, this Poppyseed Dressing delivers the sweet-meets-savory taste of the cherished classic but with an elevated ingredient list that includes avocado oil and organic apple cider vinegar.

Drizzle on strawberry spinach salads for a rich finish, top tilapia tacos, or bring a burst of bright flavor to broccoli slaw.

name: Primal Damage Control
description_html:
Primal Damage Control provides 52 nutrients in one dietary supplement, including antioxidants, phytonutrients, and essential vitamins and minerals. These vital nutrients support your body’s natural processes and defenses† so you can be at the top of your game.


†This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

name: Primal Fuel: Chocolate Coconut Whey Protein Drink Mix
description_html:
PRIMAL KITCHEN® has a "whey" with delicious drink mixes. PRIMAL FUEL® Protein Powder in Chocolate Coconut flavor is made with whey protein and other real ingredients. It delivers delectable, chocolatey taste and 10g of protein in every serving. 

Stir, mix, blend, or shake this powder into smoothies, coffee, milk, or water to enjoy!

name: Primal Fuel: Vanilla Coconut Whey Protein Drink Mix
description_html:
Gluten-free protein powder with only 1g of sugar? No way. Yes, whey! PRIMAL FUEL® Protein Powder in Vanilla Coconut flavor is the creamy, delicious drink mix of your dreams.

Simply shake, blend, stir, or mix this powder into coffee, smoothies, or milk for 10g of protein per serving.

name: Primal Kitchen Buttermilk Ranch Dressing
description_html: We’re sending boring ranch out to pasture! Primal Kitchen Buttermilk Ranch is made with grass-fed dairy plus real ingredients like avocado oil, herbs, and spices for a dreamy, creamy dressing you’re gonna want to eat ’til the cows come home.

name: Primal Kitchen Creamy Romano Dressing
description_html: Rich, creamy, and full of grass-fed dairy flavor, Primal Kitchen Creamy Romano is made with premium ingredients like good fats from avocado oil and real grass-fed romano cheese—the ideal cheese variety for your everyday creamy Italian upgrade. Dip, drizzle, dunk, and pour. This creamy dressing is grazing good!

name: Primal Kitchen Tzatziki Style Dressing
description_html: Primal Kitchen Tzatziki Style Dressing is the cool, creamy condiment of your Mediterranean dreams. This dressing delivers downright dill-icious, pasture-perfect flavor in every bite thanks to real ingredients like grass-fed yogurt, cucumber, and a medley of herbs and spices, not to mention good fats from avocado oil.

name: Primal Master Formula
description_html:
A multivitamin for men and women offering a premium high potency vitamin-mineral-antioxidant formula with phytonutrients. With 53 quality nutrients, Primal Master Formula is a comprehensive dietary supplement designed to support optimal metabolic function.†

†This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

name: Primal Mood
description_html:
The modern world is full of stressors. Primal Mood is formulated with a blend of nutrients and adaptogens—plant-based compounds that support the body’s natural response to stress.†

†These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Primal Omegas
description_html: Omega-3 fatty acids are called “essential” because your body cannot make them on its own. You must get these fatty acids through diet or supplements. Primal Omegas contain a high-quality source of the two key omega-3 fatty acids, EPA and DHA. Increase your intake with this convenient daily omega-3 supplement.

name: Primal Pantry Kit
description_html: The Primal Pantry Kit includes all the essentials to stock your kitchen with pure avocado oil and crave-worthy condiments. This kit includes:

name: Primal Probiotics
description_html:
Nearly 80% of your immune system resides in your digestive tract. A balanced gut microbiome plays an important role in supporting both the immune and digestive systems†. Primal Probiotics feature four research-proven probiotic strains designed to support your gut with 10 billion colony-forming units of probiotics per capsule. 

 

†This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

name: Primal Sun (Vitamin D)
description_html: Exposure to sunshine helps our bodies naturally produce Vitamin D. Supplementing your Vitamin D intake while staying out of the rays? It’s no sweat with Primal Sun.

name: Pure Avocado Oil
description_html:
Meet your new must-have culinary companion! Rigorously tested for quality, our delicious Primal Kitchen® Pure Avocado Oil has a high heat point that makes it ideal for grilling, broiling, air frying, baking, and more.

*There are currently different labels and packaging available, but it's always the same Pure Avocado Oil.

name: Red Sauce Variety Pack
description_html: The ultimate sidekick for pasta and pizza lovers, made with organic ingredients, no added sugars, and bursting with flavor. This red sauce variety pack includes:

name: Roasted Garlic Dipping Sauce
description_html:
Garlic lovers, this sauce is for you! Primal Kitchen Roasted Garlic Dipping Sauce is bursting with robust garlic flavor, perfect for squeezing over roasted veggies, stirring into garlic mashed potatoes, or making irresistible garlic parmesan chicken wings.

Suggested Recipes & Flavor Pairings:
  • Drizzle over green beans, broccoli, or roasted root vegetables for a flavorful side dish.
  • Stir into noodles or rice and top with protein and veggies for a one-bowl meal.
  • Spread on bread, top with shredded mozzarella and parmesan cheese, and broil for easy cheesy garlic bread.

  • Dip grilled steak bites or chicken tenders.

name: Roasted Garlic Marinara Sauce
description_html: Primal Kitchen® Roasted Garlic Marinara Sauce made with avocado oil is here and bursting with hearty, savory flavor! Our Roasted Garlic Marinara is made with only high-quality ingredients like California-grown organic tomatoes, roasted garlic, basil, and sea salt. This plant-based sauce is made without gluten, soy, or canola oil and is Paleo-certified and Whole30 Approved®.

name: Self Care Set
description_html: Unflavored Collagen Peptides make an easy and convenient way to help support hair, skin, and nails.

name: Sesame Ginger Vinaigrette & Marinade
description_html:
Savor the Sesame Ginger! PRIMAL KITCHEN® Sesame Ginger Vinaigrette & Marinade is the perfect partner to Asian-inspired eats.

Primal and Paleo Friendly, this gluten-free vinaigrette and marinade is spicy, sweet, and made with avocado and sesame oils. Try it with dishes like chicken satay, noodle salads, and Asian slaw.

name: Special Sauce
description_html: Make mealtime happier with this elevated twist on everyone’s favorite drive-thru burger sauce! Primal Kitchen Special Sauce combines the crisp, savory bite of pickle relish with tangy mustard and vibrant ketchup for lip-smacking flavor with a hint of sweetness.

name: Spicy Lover Gift Set
description_html: This bundle set brings the heat! Give a fiery friend this spicy gift set, filled with feisty flavor. With Hot Buffalo, Mango Jalapeño BBQ, and Classic BBQ Sauces, turn up the temp of marinades, glazes, braises, dips, and dunks. Spicy Ketchup seals the deal, adding an extra kick to this condiment fave.

name: Spicy Organic Unsweetened Ketchup
description_html: Spice up your life (and your breakfast tacos, fries and hot dogs) with PRIMAL KITCHEN® Spicy Ketchup! A fiery update to our classic Organic Unsweetened Ketchup, this condiment adds a calienté kick to the pantry staple! Made with USDA organic ingredients, this ketchup is Keto Certified, Certified Paleo, and Whole30 Approved®. So go ahead, get spicy!

name: Spread & Squeeze Set
description_html:
Love mayo in every delicious form? We’ve got you covered with the OG original avocado oil Mayo in a classic jar paired with convenient squeeze bottles of kicky Chipotle Lime and savory Garlic Aioli for those special occasions & one-off recipes.

All crafted with premium, high-quality ingredients like avocado oil and Certified Humane® cage-free eggs, of course!

name: Squeeze Chipotle Lime Mayo
description_html:
Conquer your condiment cravings with a kick! Now in an easy-to-use squeezable mayo bottle, our Chipotle Lime Mayo made with Avocado Oil is a zesty update to our classic mayo.

Spicy chipotle powder and lime add a peppery punch to crab cakes, home-style fries, fish tacos, sandwiches and much more.

name: Squeeze Garlic Aioli Mayo
description_html:
Squeeze the day! Our savory Garlic Aioli Mayo is now available in a convenient easy-squeeze bottle. Purposefully crafted with avocado oil and cage-free eggs, this premium spread has a creamy, classic taste elevated with savory garlic and zesty lemon.

Squeeze it on chicken sandwiches, mix it into artichoke dip, or pair it with burgers and baked salmon.

name: Squeeze Mayo with Avocado Oil
description_html: The mayo that started it all is ready to squeeze! Made with avocado oil and cage-free eggs for a taste that’s uncompromisingly delicious in an easy-to-use, squeezable mayo bottle.

name: Starter Staples
description_html: If you’re looking for an introduction to Primal Kitchen products, this is it! Start your real food journey with flavorful, medium-heat Buffalo Sauce that’s free from corn syrup or artificial sweeteners, the original must-have avocado oil mayo, and delicious pantry essentials crafted with premium, purposeful ingredients.

name: Steak Sauce
description_html:
PRIMAL KITCHEN® Steak Sauce is a must-have marinade to soak up flavor and seal in moisture for meats.

No artificial sweeteners, low calorie and made with USDA organic ingredients, this Whole30 Approved®, Certified Paleo, and Keto Certified sauce is plant-based and vegan.

name: Sundried Tomato Pasta Sauce
description_html: Inspired by the viral Marry Me Chicken recipe, this rich, decadent pasta sauce marries the taste of organic California-grown sundried tomatoes with a vibrant medley of garlic and herbs. With real ingredients and a farm-fresh flavor, it’s the perfect partner for noodles, shrimp, chicken, or veggies!

name: Supplement Stack
description_html: The Primal Blueprint supplement line is designed to complement your lifestyle, focusing on filling potential nutritional gaps and supporting your well-being.

name: Tartar Sauce
description_html: PRIMAL KITCHEN® Tartar Sauce is here and it’s kind of a big dill. Our Tartar Sauce is Whole30 Approved®, Keto and Paleo Certified, and sugar-free*, so you can slather on crab cakes, or get saucy with sweet potato fries. Creamy, tangy, with just the right amount of dill, this classic Tartar Sauce is made with avocado oil, no fishy ingredients here!

name: The Keto Reset Diet
description_html: With step-by-step guidance, daily meal plans and a recipe section with over 100 delicious keto-friendly recipes, this is the definitive guide to help the keto-beginner or the experienced health enthusiast understand the what, why, and how to succeed with ketogenic eating.

name: The Keto Reset Instant Pot Cookbook
description_html: If you want a no-fuss way to get high-fat, low-carb meals on the table faster, The Keto Reset Instant Pot Cookbook makes following a keto-friendly diet easy with 75 all-new pressure cooker recipes.

name: The Primal Kitchen Cookbook: Eat Like Your Life Depends On It!
description_html: 131 of Mark Sisson's favorite recipes (low carb, gluten free) hand-picked from 50+ top Paleo authors and chefs.

name: Thick & Sticky Honey Teriyaki Sauce & Marinade
description_html: Wok this way! Primal Kitchen® Thick & Sticky Honey Teriyaki delivers the sweet, umami flavor you want and the rib-stickin’ texture you crave–all without artificial sweeteners, refined sugar, or soy. Crafted with high-quality ingredients including premium organic honey and organic coconut aminos, this traditional teriyaki makes the perfect wing dip, meat marinade, or sticky-sweet base for your next stir-fry.

name: Tomato Basil Marinara Sauce
description_html:
Spaghetti without the regret-ti. Primal Kitchen® Tomato Basil Marinara Sauce is made with avocado oil, California-grown organic tomatoes, and basil— a simply delicious, classic take on a pantry staple!

With no added sugars, gluten, canola or soybean oil, our plant-based sauce is Paleo-certified, Non-GMO Project verified, and Whole30 Approved®.

name: Two Meals a Day
description_html: Implement an eating style that’s incredibly nourishing and easy to adhere to for a lifetime, dial-in a winning fitness routine, prioritize recovery, and learn powerful strategies for overcoming self-limiting beliefs and behaviors. When you’re ready to level up, you’ll implement some cutting-edge techniques to achieve stunning body composition breakthroughs. Packed with forty-two delicious meals in a variety of categories, Two Meals A Day has everything you need to hit the ground running and pursue enjoyable and lasting lifestyle transformation.

name: Unflavored Collagen Peptides
description_html: Primal Kitchen Collagen Peptides offer an easy and convenient way to help support hair, skin, and nails with 11g of collagen in every scoop. Shake up your daily routine with this premium collagen powder in your coffee, smoothie, or overnight oats.

name: Unsweetened Red Pizza Sauce
description_html: The‌ ‌‌pie's‌‌ ‌the‌ ‌limit!‌ ‌Unsweetened,‌ ‌made‌ ‌with‌ ‌avocado‌ ‌oil,‌ ‌Keto‌ ‌Certified,‌ ‌Certified‌ ‌Paleo,‌ ‌and‌ ‌Whole30‌ ‌Approved®,‌ ‌this‌ ‌savory‌ ‌sauce‌ ‌is‌ ‌primed‌ ‌for‌ ‌a‌ ‌pizza‌ ‌party.‌ ‌

name: Vanilla Coconut Flavored Collagen Peptide Mix
description_html: Now with 25 servings per container! Shake up your routine with the delectable taste of Primal Kitchen Vanilla Coconut Collagen made from 6 trusted ingredients. Sweetened with monk fruit, this vanilla collagen powder packs 11g of collagen in every scoop to support hair, skin & nails.

name: Wing Night Kit
description_html:
Tackle game day or family night with three bold, classic flavors that level up crispy air-fried wings, dips, wraps, and more. From the bold cayenne kick of our bestselling Buffalo Sauce to creamy Ranch Dressing and Buffalo Ranch with just a kiss of heat, wing night never tasted so good.  

This trio is crafted with delicious avocado oil and premium ingredients you can feel good feeding to your crew.

name: Yum Yum Sauce
description_html: The classic Japanese steakhouse sauce comes to your house. Purposefully crafted with real ingredients like avocado oil, Primal Kitchen Yum Yum Sauce has a lightly sweet, sour, and tangy flavor that begs to be smothered on everything.
